required_preferences.fact: Sets a stricter 9:45pm device curfew — avoids all screen use after 9:45pm, including in the living room, to prioritize migraine prevention

supersedes.fact: Sets a strict 10:30pm device curfew to improve sleep quality — never uses screens in bed

required_preferences.fact: Schedules most team meetings as video calls across various time zones — only hosts in-person meetings for rare local collaborations

supersedes.fact: Schedules all team meetings in-person before noon — no longer hosts video calls except for cross-site collaboration

required_preferences.fact: Prepares weeknight outfits and lunches every Sunday evening in advance to streamline busy office mornings
Plays co-op video games online with college friends every Wednesday night — never plays solo games
Blocks 30 minutes after late-evening task force calls for decompressing with short mindfulness meditation or journaling, to offset stress and sleep disruption
Always researches healthy meal options and preorders to-go food near the conference venue to maintain his migraine- and weight-management routines while traveling

persona: A 28-year-old customer support manager at a multinational e-commerce company
